title: Kefir's Flashlight
body:
# Advanced Flashlight & True Darkness

Turn Minecraft into an atmospheric horror experience. This shader pack completely replaces the vanilla lighting engine with a highly realistic, customizable flashlight system.

Unlike standard lighting mods that just place a light block where you look, this shader simulates a volumetric light beam projecting from your camera into 3D space. It interacts with fog, fades naturally over distance, and creates a genuine sense of dread.

## ⚙️ Fully Customizable

Access the Shader Options menu to tweak every aspect of the light

   * Beam Geometry: Adjust the Core Size, Halo Width, and Intensity of each layer. Make a tight laser pointer or a wide floodlight.

* Volumetric Density: Control how visible the beam is in the air.

* Range & Falloff: Set the maximum distance of the light.

* Color of light: Precisely adjust color for each layer.

* Horror Settings: Toggle Flickering for a spooky effect, or adjust the Ambient Brightness to control how dark the shadows are.

macOS / Linux Friendly: _Written in modern GLSL 330 Core, ensuring full compatibility with M1/M2/M3 Macs and modern Linux drivers._

## 🔓 License

This project is Open Source (MIT). You are free to use this in your modpacks, adventure maps, or modify the code for your own projects.
